plan.annotation: No product screenshot bitmap was supplied. The 16:9 media region is an explicit replacement-required placeholder; the three numbered callouts map only to verified product surfaces.

operations.label: 16:9 media region
operations.value: Large focal placeholder marked 'Screenshot replacement required'; no interface is simulated.

operations.label: Numbered callouts 1-3
operations.value: 1) Model selection is visible. 2) Validation status is visible. 3) Trace inspection is available.

operations.label: Missing-evidence label
operations.value: Placeholder is labeled as replacement-required because no bitmap evidence was provided.

plan.pptxFallback: In PowerPoint the 16:9 placeholder and the three numbered callouts export as grouped-editable shapes; the placeholder remains labeled 'Screenshot replacement required' and no product screenshot is manufactured.

sourceLabels.label: Evidence availability: no product screenshot bitmap included; verified surfaces are model selection, validation status, and the Trace inspector.

plan.takeaway: Model selection, validation status, and trace inspection are the verified surfaces of the reviewable-generation workflow; the screenshot itself must be supplied before this slide is final.
plan.title: Reviewable Generation: Product Controls
